class.name: modbus_ros2_control/ModbusHardware
class.description: Modbus ROS2 Control Hardware Interface Supports multiple Modbus-based end effectors (grippers, etc.) with different protocols. Currently supports: Changingtek gripper

class.name: modbus_ros2_control/DexterousHandHardware
class.description: Modbus ROS2 Control Hardware Interface for Dexterous Hand Supports O7 mechanical hand via Modbus RTU protocol. Modbus ID: Right hand 0x27, Left hand 0x28 Baudrate: 115200 (fixed) Function codes: 04 (read), 16 (write)
